scripts.dev: bash -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; else exec python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; fi'
scripts.lint: bash -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python -m ruff check .; else exec python3 -m ruff check .; fi'
scripts.build: echo 'Python package has no turbo build output; use pip/uv install.'
